judgment.summary: Fortinet demonstrates robust growth and high profitability, though its valuation reflects these strengths.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimates by 32.6%; next earnings date is 2026-08-05.
positives: Revenue growth 20.1% YoY and Earnings growth 28.6% YoY indicate strong top-line and bottom-line expansion.
Operating margin 31.3% and Profit margin 27.5% show excellent operational efficiency and profitability.
Return on equity 132.4% is exceptionally high, suggesting efficient use of shareholder capital.
Free cash flow $1.81B TTM provides ample resources for operations and investment.
Strong beat on last quarter's EPS (0.82 vs 0.62 estimate) highlights positive earnings momentum.
negatives: Trailing P/E 50.10 and Forward P/E 37.59 indicate a premium valuation.
PEG ratio 2.88 suggests the stock may be overvalued relative to its earnings growth.
Price/Book 95.52 and Price/Sales 13.27 are very high, indicating significant market expectations.
Analyst consensus is 'hold' with a mean target price below the current spot price.

news.paragraph: Fortinet is partnering with NVIDIA to enhance real-time AI data security, a move that could bolster its position in the rapidly growing AI infrastructure market. This collaboration comes as the company prepares for its next earnings report, where investors will be looking for continued strong performance in cybersecurity solutions. Traders should consider the strategic implications of this partnership and how it might influence future growth prospects.

headlines.title: NVIDIA Corporation (NVDA) Partners with Fortinet to Secure AI Data in Real Time

examples.body: After a sharp selloff in Software ($IGV) at the market open, $MSFT $ORCL $PANW $FTNT made a sharp reversal rebound.
$FTNT when the price is going sideways and the RSI is over 70, that can mean the trend is weakening and it's best to set a stop loss if that works for you.…
$FTNT Let’s pull her back to $120 Not asking for much
